graphics.alt: Diagram of jamburgr moving from config input through harmony, voicing, patterning, layers, and MIDI output.
graphics.purpose: Explain the complete generation flow at a glance.

graphics.alt: Diagram comparing jamburgr single, multi, both, and pack output modes.
graphics.purpose: Clarify the output choices before users generate MIDI.

graphics.alt: Diagram showing key and scale flowing into Roman numerals, chord types, voicings, and MIDI notes.
graphics.purpose: Explain how harmonic text settings become MIDI notes.

graphics.alt: Diagram of jamburgr chord, bass, pad, and lead layers stacked by musical register.
graphics.purpose: Show how generated MIDI layers divide production roles.

graphics.alt: Diagram connecting each style to defaults, anatomy, reference canon, producer exercises, and source IDs.
graphics.purpose: Explain the educational The Jam Library data model.

graphics.alt: Diagram showing jamburgr MIDI files being dragged from a pack folder into a DAW session.
graphics.purpose: Clarify the producer workflow after MIDI generation.
